goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 0' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the 'centre' and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 0 and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the centre and should be in the moderate price range
Make sure you get address and postcode
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get entrance fee
